dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6037 IH: To reauthorize the West Valley demonstration project.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Langworthy introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce

form.official-title: To reauthorize the West Valley demonstration project.

section.text: Section 3(a) of the West Valley Demonstration Project Act (Public Law 96–368; 42 U.S.C. 2021a note) is amended by striking $75,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2020 through 2026 and inserting $150,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2027 through 2037.
